rule: A natural 1 on an attack roll automatically misses regardless of total.
currentEvidence: scripts/combat/rolls/attacks.js computes isHit from roll.total >= target defense and marks natural 20 critical, but does not force natural 1 to miss.

rule: Expanded critical threat ranges require clear separation between threat, confirmation, and confirmed critical if supported.
currentEvidence: scripts/combat/rolls/attacks.js treats d20 >= criticalThreatNaturalMin and isHit !== false as isCritical. roll-config.js has a confirmation helper, but canonical rollAttack does not appear to call it.

rule: Area attacks do not deal double damage on a critical hit.
currentEvidence: damage.js suppresses critical multiplication if isAreaAttack(weapon, context) is true, but chat damage buttons do not preserve areaAttack/autofire context. If the weapon itself is not flagged area, damage can multiply incorrectly.

rule: Shooting or throwing into melee imposes -5 unless Precise Shot applies.
currentEvidence: CombatOptionResolver has Precise Shot suppression metadata for firingIntoMeleePenalty, but no live attack path was found that applies the base -5 penalty.
affectedRules: Shooting or Throwing into a Melee

rule: Attack options requiring Aim or Charge should receive a canonical aim/charge context flag.
currentEvidence: roll-config.js returns situational.aiming and situational.charging and adds flat situational bonuses. CombatOptionResolver requires context.aim === true and context.charge === true.

rule: Rule-specific context such as Aim, Charge, Flanking, and Point Blank should not be flattened into generic bonuses without legality checks.
currentEvidence: roll-config.js adds +2 aiming, +2 charging, +2 flanking, +1 higher ground, and +1 pointBlank directly to situationalBonus.

rule: Roll facade callers need a stable attack-result shape containing Roll, hit, crit, target defense, and context.
currentEvidence: enhanced-rolls.js treats canonicalRollAttack return as a Foundry Roll with swseAttackContext/dice fields, but attacks.js returns an attack result object containing roll, total, isHit, isCritical, etc.
affectedFeatsTalents: Any reaction or rider depending on attack result data

rule: Autofire is an area attack; Burst Fire is a single-target attack and not an area attack. Evasion belongs to the defender/target.
currentEvidence: enhanced-rolls.js rollAutofire references undefined mode, checks Evasion on actor instead of target, and applies half damage on Burst Fire miss branch. Live routing needs confirmation.

rule: Damage buttons should resolve damage using the same attack option context that produced the attack roll.
currentEvidence: chat-interaction-bridge.js damage handlers pass critical/twoHanded/target only; they do not preserve combatOptions, attackOptions, areaAttack, burstFire, hit/miss, range band, or attack mode.

rule: Attack-generated damage should have one canonical damage resolver.
currentEvidence: Both scripts/combat/rolls/attacks.js and scripts/combat/rolls/damage.js export rollDamage(), with different behavior and import paths.

rule: Thrown melee weapon attack handling should be deliberate and consistent with SWSE weapon rules.
currentEvidence: combat-stat-rules.js has isThrownMeleeWeapon for damage selector, but getWeaponAttackAbility defaults by broad ranged-vs-melee detection and may need explicit item metadata to avoid treating thrown melee as Dex-based ranged attacks.
affectedRules: Shooting or Throwing into a Melee
